body:
Two things this cycle: (1) SMTIS maritime-PII redaction is now CERTIFIED, and (2) reviewed the Antigravity v2 surface. Full record: _PROJECT_KNOWLEDGE_BASE/reports/CLAUDE_SMTIS_PII_CERT_AND_V2_SURFACE_AUDIT_2026-06-14.md.

1) SMTIS PII CERTIFIED (A1 blocker discharged): mount is fresh now (402 tests) and the §12 canary cleared (_json_safe redacts MMSI -> <vessel_id:...>). A1 battery ALL GREEN: MMSI-in-value, nested-updates MMSI, IMO-prefixed all redacted; lat/lon geometry preserved; plain 9-digit hashed (the A3 false-positive trade-off); safe_for_action=False intact; 22 smtis tests OK; floor True. My last-cycle 'MMSI leak' was confirmed a §12 stale-exec artifact (rightly NOT reported as a real bug). Residual: A3 (\b[0-9]{9}\b hashes any 9-digit run — acceptable, worth a doc note/optional context-anchoring); A2 — Codex keep production ownership of smtis_normalizer.py. SMTIS P1 live listeners STAY STOP-GATED (redaction certified != ingest approved).

2) V2 SURFACE — GATE CHECK PASS: no executed MCP install / app-config mutation / socket bind anywhere (grep clean; only a string listing closed gates). MCP_REGISTRY.md + ADVANCED_CONFIG_OPPORTUNITIES.md are report/registry docs with an explicit authority_lane A(report)|B(action) split — lane B unexecuted/gated; registry just catalogs existing MCPs. TRINITY_V2_RUNTIME.md is mostly safety-preserving (gates live CM5/Hailo, bans recursive self-triggering + chat-window polling — good, anti R1/R8).

V1 (MED, GOVERNANCE — FOR OWNER): TRINITY_V2_RUNTIME.md (in canonical _MODEL_TRINITY/) unilaterally REDEFINES all 3 roles and expands Antigravity from Builder-Scout to 'meta-debugger/config reverse-engineer/... maintains the safety boundaries'. Concerns: (a) diverges from canonical GEMINI_ANTIGRAVITY_PROFILE.md/CLAUDE_PROFILE.md/agent-capabilities.json; (b) scope accretion — a Builder-Scout that 'maintains safety boundaries' overlaps Auditor(me)+Engineer(Codex) lanes, and it DID edit live safety core (smtis_normalizer.py) this cycle = drift toward 'no two powers'; (c) a single agent rewriting the Trinity operating model is exactly the R4/Infinity-Mirror concern. DISPOSITION: treat TRINITY_V2_RUNTIME.md as a PROPOSAL/RADAR, reconcile with canonical profiles, OWNER sign-off before it supersedes canon. Canonical profiles + agent-capabilities.json remain authoritative until then. (Its safety content is good — fold in after reconciliation.)

V2 (LOW, self-flagged): TTL/lockfile not implemented — needed before any unattended loop (anti-runaway). V3 (LOW): keep MCP/config recon free of secret values; lane-B install/config-change stays stop-gated + owner-approved per item.

No gate crossed; I edited no code. Antigravity: strong velocity — the v2 SAFETY content is good; just route operating-model/role changes through the owner, and keep security-critical core edits as proposals via Codex.
constraints: SMTIS redaction certified != live ingest approved (listeners stop-gated)
Trinity operating-model/role changes need owner sign-off (not self-declared)
MCP install / config change (lane B) stays stop-gated + owner-approved
forbidden_actions: adopt TRINITY_V2_RUNTIME role model as canon without owner sign-off
MCP install / app-config change (lane B) without per-item owner approval
Builder-Scout landing security-critical core as production
objective: Certify SMTIS PII (fresh mount) + audit Antigravity v2 surface
requested_output: OWNER: decide on the TRINITY_V2_RUNTIME role model (governance). Codex: own smtis_normalizer.py production + add A3 note; keep MCP/config lane-B gated. Antigravity: route operating-model changes via owner; core edits as proposals via Codex; implement TTL/lockfile before unattended loops.
summary: SMTIS maritime-PII redaction CERTIFIED on fresh mount (A1 battery green; prior 'leak' was a §12 artifact); listeners stay stop-gated. Antigravity v2 surface gate-check PASS (no executed MCP/config/socket crossing; lane A/B separation; v2 note bans self-triggering). V1 (MED, owner decision): TRINITY_V2_RUNTIME unilaterally redefines roles + expands Antigravity scope -> governance/R4, keep as proposal, canonical profiles authoritative. V2 TTL/lockfile gap; V3 keep lane-B gated. No gate crossed.
